prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all JavaScript source files in nodejs/node that defend against prototype pollution in core utilities: Object.create(null) usage, hasOwnProperty checks, and the safe merge/assign patterns used in core modules.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the nodejs-web-stack fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all JavaScript source files in nodejs/node that defend against prototype pollution in core utilities: Object.create(null) usage, hasOwnProperty checks, and the safe merge/assign patterns used in core modules.
